[Leila Character](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=6f7f0fa28011638856ab6d2943112bbebbf0b6fd0b85c2b33ccf45fe4b13d5c5&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=0af5d93ba90adbac01134cd8ffe45202&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), Assistant Prof. at Texas A&M, for a project using hyperspectral-imaging drones for archaeological research in Belize.
[Nour Bou Malhab](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=97d5df01b13e711ed39a9b8a10925227ed2c1bb6b1acc0eb5023b955c5a033fe&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=b15cfe8a9abf00142063ff73094ab151&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), Lebanon, for promoting classical liberal thought throughout Lebanon and across the Maghreb.
[Isaac Akintaro](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e343d3da63b5d3fa98d222050ec1a0b793c469d4a4f50a514adbfd7d605707ec&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=6aaa80c56ee23112ab9c99a8aafd780a&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), Nigeria/England, computer science PhD Candidate, for travel to San Francisco
[Nikita Greenidg](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=ccadc40178e88c874aee0c1ee459ab2c83ca06032b5dac4b66ca31ec7a1ad1ae&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=8ec0288761da9c08167ac1ffcf9b7af9&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3)e, St. Lucia/England, PhD in Surgical Robotics, for a startup using AI to improve surgical techniques in the Caribbean.
[Michael Konu](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4f42531ad655d63615344d6c32939d71510a2d0d2da966fecdbaf11583955242&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=456e2dd95990bf8bc75796fb62d11b00&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), Ghana/USA, for bioengineering research on virtual cells and for career development.
[Waldo Krugell](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e41476e07e2b50be9e00b67a9607829a4dce0c4a15e5d1383bb62309529cce86&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=cfb6df7800af28fbe468bb6366425917&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), South Africa, Prof. at North West University, for a project improving economics education for South African high-school students.
[Edmund Trueman](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=0089771c44e2c30f42b051340ee7d35922470b580c51022ae2361e565ea3563e&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=e1be25e4ffd5b54c7ecd2bdddc95224d&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), to develop a digital archive to showcase Congolese comics.
[ Justin Sooknanan](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=21f1d775c76793158b0e2b4525f2032b5f49c48980b8e2a289bb2efb54a2a08c&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=806d804d221ba7218d582226db72ad38&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), Trinidad & Tobago, undergrad electrical engineering, travel grant to UK and for career development.
[Temitope Johnson](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=86901891831295e5e6928827ec68e4e2eace4c6a1d6a107bb2bf901c01cf8293&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=31471fe1d735f1a3370f7f699977d5d7&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), Nigeria/South Africa, for designing a phototherapy device for neonatal jaundice treatment.[Mmesomachi Nwachukwu](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=803eb950f0e97aef298110730074d9f7eb4308271502c9ba398164b31a860e24&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=da27b413efd2353cfc49d79f2957f589&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), Nigeria, for running a national training program preparing students for the International Mathematical Olympiad.
Jibrin Jaafaru, Nigeria, PhD candidate, for travel to the United States to pursue a bioinformatics fellowship
[Ollie Sayeed](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f89e59e011672bd73798da685b850dbc4eeddf18a69fa51b3d485df40e4d2e55&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=1cad405023df40886e7fa4647a4adbed&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), PhD UPenn, historical linguist, for research evaluating the effectiveness of malaria interventions in Africa
[Shreya Hegde](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=45169c36d52e896ab88b75bdc906b6e5b66161e9fa86e4e8f3c576864b0b3ea6&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=d2421413e30c10b026265e37dfe576dd&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), for drone-mapping and route-optimization work in Kenya.
[Jan Grzymski](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=611c912ef6bfa756a881757d6c90efb12a0d9061cf0388f271723b8edf6a949f&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=f3af4415199d264a73c9bd7b71db8ed2&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), Assistant Professor at Lazarski University, to run a summer program introducing Caribbean scholars to Poland’s transition from communist rule to a market-driven economy.
[Arun Shanmuganathan](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=fe35f2d61766979da61d66968538cbf16fcd5968fd98e070dfd5acc9ecc883e1&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=517750226ca8c0d0fa9e37e0eaebe4d4&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), Rwanda, to support mathematics training at the African Olympiad Academy.
[Samiya Allen](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=5c8fa5ca91a3d38ea3ee32ce72c308b60a2421f81793764b6eef8f18ee82c2d8&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=f91857b8f5200610094b90a107f98bfb&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), Barbados, undergrad electronics, travel grant to UK for robotics training and career development.
[Rose Mutiso](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=7c3f994d90a67004280f77e837de7870120b1cad4de8f210f95af07ce60991c2&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=91d857464e032a07efbeace154024925&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), Kenya, PhD UPenn in materials science, to create the African Tech Futures Lab, to improve policymaking on energy technologies.
[Darren Ramsook](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=46a27b338dc849bb66e8626c021aa0a95a530809fb9fe28c1896d7b38caacd82&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=86d199ac9ecc829d2c23b0e0d7ddd7a8&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), Trinidad & Tobago, Postdoc at Trinity College Dublin, for research on AI-driven video compression.
[Cheyenne Polius](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=ef78dc1dc235c2eeac47b07d20e30b87b4b42465050e8f747a4ee75b222f2c24&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=72991795519345229cd4d57cbc35d3ff&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3), St. Lucia, for work on astro-tourism and space education in the Caribbean.
I thank [Rasheed Griffith](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f7a6229c8ce9932407a76f9e331a88d2bb5e9c8fafa4dd0bdb9f737457742a1a&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=8006bd361c26165c1f22b6227f2577ca&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3) for his excellent work on this, and again Nabeel has created [excellent software](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=1752c461d8f28908077627bbfec46561e51146dfd869bc6509b928803479dc33&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=5f2cac764b0b7d6ce409efe85130788a&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3) to help organize the list of winners, using AI.
Those unfamiliar with Emergent Ventures can learn more [here](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=0691080cf439b5108a0c7fea5e88522afce27ead427517d530b2075eb636959a&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=89788ac466910ada3d46c729c0514bca&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3) and [here](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=3495c2575ceb886cafbc0557ba478e6bacbf1be8a75f48bf7e57bbe4f21a77b7&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=6140ba732f5e98b86cd02ed49928bf88&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3). The EV African and the Caribbean announcement is [here](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=3c3273fc8c019b79c7ac08e40eb52b7b1154759286ae554a76a48d8cd73b79dc&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=f360772e01e319bea4754a5f92f10f4d&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3) and you can see previous cohorts [here](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=53da91ab25bc134c9ae62b53855edbd223fa91e4760c51b657e840b13f1027aa&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91945&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=b9c61e547dc8491064f22d30ee42cee3&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=84a2c4d402e4e75fc510d503656d47a3). If you are interested in supporting this tranche of Emergent Ventures, please write to me or to Rasheed.
